return(function(h,Q,z,s,j,V,t,n,i,u,Y,w,M,e,y,H,R,X,D,O,x,Z,K,P,T)X,K,T,x,y,w,P,O,Y,R,Z,i,D,n,u,e,M,H=function(h,r)local Q=Z(r)local z=function(...)return T(h,{...},r,Q)end return z
